title: Dark-Funnel Capture

content.statement: A large portion of influence is untracked.
content.question: How much of your business's growth is happening off-dashboard in DMs, word of mouth, or offline? Are you measuring it at all?
sop: Add a 'How did you hear about us?' open-text question at signup or checkout, not a dropdown menu.
Track branded search volume, meaning people searching your business name directly, month over month.
Rate Self-Reported mentions, Direct traffic, Branded Search, and social Mentions each as a share of total signals (see calculation, page 6).
Ask your last 10 customers directly, in a message, how they actually found you, and compare their answer to what your dashboard says.
Invest a small, deliberate budget in whatever channel keeps showing up in these direct answers, even if it's hard to attribute.
content.explainer: The real funnel is wider than your dashboard. Ask people how they heard about you, in their words.
questions: How much of your business's growth is happening off-dashboard in DMs, word of mouth, or offline? Are you measuring it at all?
The next 10 customers who buy, will you actually ask them how they first heard of you, or assume you know?
If half your 'organic' or 'direct' traffic is actually word-of-mouth you can't see, how would that change what you invest in?

definitions.def: The parts of a customer's decision journey, DMs, word of mouth, offline conversations, that never show up in analytics.
Customers telling other people about you directly, outside any tracked channel.

content.equation_example: Self-Reported mentions 40%, Direct traffic 25%, Branded Search 20%, Social Mentions 15%. (40 plus 25 plus 20 plus 15) divided by 4 equals 25% out of 100%. Higher means a larger share of your real growth is happening in untracked, dark-funnel channels, worth deliberate investment even without clean attribution. Lower means your dashboard is probably capturing most of what's actually driving growth.
content.closing_statement: Not everything that matters shows up in a dashboard.

caption:
Principle Nº 97: Dark-Funnel Capture

A large portion of influence is untracked.

Ask yourself: How much of your business's growth is happening off-dashboard in DMs, word of mouth, or offline? Are you measuring it at all?
